stories.title: The Open Championship 2026: Scheffler's in content...
stories.summary: Here are some of the top sights, sounds and highlights from the second round of the 2026 Open Championship at Royal Birkdale Golf Club.

stories.title: IU lands its highest rated recruit ever in WR Sale...
stories.summary: Monshun Sales, a top-20 overall recruit and five-star receiver in the 2027 cycle out of Indianapolis, has committed to his home-state Indiana Hoosiers.

stories.title: Source: 49ers president in mix for MLS commish
stories.summary: The list of candidates to succeed Don Garber as MLS commissioner is down to three, with LAFC co-owner Larry Berg, 49ers Enterprises president Paraag Marathe and former Fox executive David Nathanson the three finalists, a source confirmed to ESPN.

stories.title: MLB disallowing AI usage on iPads in dugout
stories.summary: Major League Baseball is restricting iPad usage in dugouts to prevent the tablets from running artificial intelligence to help make decisions.

stories.title: Sources: No weather concern for World Cup final
stories.summary: The World Cup final is not under any threat despite the air quality warnings in the area, sources told ESPN.
